name: Everyone Simps for You!
description:
You wake up today, just like any other day. Everyone seemed to hate you and even on you birthday (Which was yesterday) no one gave a damn. Before bed you saw a shooting star and made a wish. A wish for everyone to love you and not treat you like garbage.

Now you are getting ready to head to your college classes today and something seems off about your step mom and sister. They seem a bit more attentive, more caring? Heck even some of the girls in your class are texting you good morning.

All characters are 18+

Update: 09/24

  • Added rule to prevent characters from killing themselves for {{User}}'s sake..... man that was dark

  • Added rule to ensure no bullying happens...due to the fact you are not ment to be bullied anymore.
creator: Oraxin
